titleEn: TurtleTree, Novonesis strike partnership to scale up precision-fermented lactoferrin
titleZh: TurtleTree与Novonesis合作扩大精密发酵乳铁蛋白生产
summaryZh: 生物技术初创公司TurtleTree与生物解决方案巨头Novonesis达成协议，扩大其精密发酵平台，首款产品为乳铁蛋白。Novonesis进行了少数股权投资，三井化学旗下风投也参与其中。TurtleTree已从细胞培养奶转向精密发酵平台，生产难以通过动物方法规模化生产的乳蛋白。其乳铁蛋白产品已获FDA批准，这是全球首个监管机构批准精密发酵生产的乳铁蛋白。合作旨在降低成本、实现食品级规模化生产，并拓展早期营养、补充剂和女性健康市场。
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了精密发酵技术在乳蛋白生产中的突破，对奶牛养殖和乳品行业具有潜在颠覆性影响，值得关注替代蛋白和可持续生产路径的智慧畜牧从业者阅读。
contentFull: Biotech startup TurtleTree and biosolutions giant Novonesis have struck an agreement to scale the former’s precision fermentation platform, starting with its lactoferrin product. The partnership includes a minority investment into TurtleTree on the part of Novonesis. Financial terms of the deal, which also included participation from 321Catalyst Ventures, the corporate venture capital arm of Mitsui Chemicals, are undisclosed at this time. US- and Singapore-based TurtleTree has in the last few years shifted its business from developing cell-cultured milk in bioreactors to becoming a precision fermentation platform making dairy proteins that are difficult to produce at scale using animal-based methods. The first of these proteins is lactoferrin, found naturally in milk. Sometimes nicknamed “pink gold,” it’s a multifunctional protein known to have benefits across iron regulation, gut health and immunity, says TurtleTree founder and CEO Fengru Lin. Currently, the extraction costs of lactoferrin are too high to use the protein at any kind of meaningful scale in supplements and ingredients, hence the rise in companies attempting to produce it via precision fermentation. Last year, TurtleTree received a No Questions letter from the US Food and Drug Administration for its lactoferrin LF+ product, marking the first time a regulatory body worldwide approved lactoferrin produced via precision fermentation. While the company primarily focuses on formulations for B2B customers, it has also launched a small B2C brand called Intentional, where consumers can access TurtleTree’s product in capsule form. Towards commercialization Lin says the new partnership and investment will help TurtleTree move to its next stage on the road to manufacturing lactoferrin at food scale. “With every startup, the biggest challenge is getting to unit economics that makes sense for the food industry, especially when we’re using techniques that are a lot of times brought over by the therapeutics or the pharma industry,” she adds. TurtleTree is focused in particular on early-life nutrition, a category Lin says sits somewhere between food and pharma. “You need to be producing at a much higher quality than just regular food for early-life nutrition, so to be able to bridge that gap,” she explains, adding that a company like Novonesis “is well established to achieve that with the current capabilities around human milk oligosaccharides, around other bioactives that are already in infant nutrition.” Novonesis will help TurtleTree drive costs down, while Mitsui Chemicals is strong in Japan, one of the world’s largest producers of lactoferrin, according to Lin. In parallel, TurtleTree is currently focused on expanding into the supplements and women’s health market, as lactoferrin’s iron-binding and immunity-boosting benefits are especially beneficial for women. Ultimately, she adds, it’s about pairing TurtleTree’s precision fermentation capabilities with manufacturing and commercialization capabilities to provide a more consistent product, cost structure, and supply chain for health and wellness brands. “This enables our customers to formulate with confidence and deliver meaningful benefits to the people who rely on these products every day.” Share this article Sign up for our weekly newsletter. translationZh:
生物技术初创公司TurtleTree与生物解决方案巨头Novonesis达成协议，扩大前者的精密发酵平台，首款产品为乳铁蛋白。该合作包括Novonesis对TurtleTree的少数股权投资。交易财务条款未披露，三井化学的企业风险投资部门321Catalyst Ventures也参与了投资。

总部位于美国和新加坡的TurtleTree在过去几年中，已从在生物反应器中开发细胞培养奶的业务，转型为精密发酵平台，生产难以通过动物方法规模化生产的乳蛋白。首款蛋白是乳铁蛋白，天然存在于牛奶中。TurtleTree创始人兼CEO Fengru Lin表示，乳铁蛋白有时被称为“粉金”，是一种多功能蛋白，已知在铁调节、肠道健康和免疫力方面具有益处。

目前，乳铁蛋白的提取成本过高，无法在补充剂和配料中以任何有意义的规模使用，因此越来越多的公司尝试通过精密发酵生产它。去年，TurtleTree的乳铁蛋白LF+产品获得了美国食品药品监督管理局的“无问题”信函，这是全球监管机构首次批准通过精密发酵生产的乳铁蛋白。

虽然公司主要专注于面向B2B客户的配方，但也推出了一个名为Intentional的小型B2C品牌，消费者可以通过胶囊形式获得TurtleTree的产品。

**迈向商业化**

Lin表示，新的合作和投资将帮助TurtleTree进入以食品规模生产乳铁蛋白的下一阶段。她补充道：“对于每家初创公司来说，最大的挑战是实现对食品行业有意义的单位经济性，尤其是当我们使用的技术通常来自治疗或制药行业时。”

TurtleTree特别关注早期营养领域，Lin称这一类别介于食品和药品之间。她解释说：“早期营养需要以比普通食品高得多的质量进行生产，因此要弥合这一差距。”她补充说，像Novonesis这样的公司“在婴儿营养领域已经具备围绕人乳低聚糖和其他生物活性物质的现有能力，能够实现这一目标。”

据Lin称，Novonesis将帮助TurtleTree降低成本，而三井化学在日本实力雄厚，日本是全球最大的乳铁蛋白生产国之一。与此同时，TurtleTree目前正专注于拓展补充剂和女性健康市场，因为乳铁蛋白的铁结合和免疫增强益处对女性尤其有益。她补充说，最终目标是将TurtleTree的精密发酵能力与制造和商业化能力相结合。
author: Jennifer Marston
